title: CustomEmojiQueryInput.filter_space_id: owned String vs &str inconsistency
description: mod.rs line 182: CustomEmojiQueryInput.filter_space_id is Option<String> (owned) while every analogous filter-ID field in the module uses &str (e.g. MessageQueryInput.chat_id: Option<&str>). Callers must allocate a String to pass a filter that is normally a string literal or a borrowed slice. Fix: add a lifetime to CustomEmojiQueryInput and make the field Option<&'a str>, consistent with the rest of the module.
close_reason: fixed in k8t review: CustomEmojiQueryInput now uses Option<&str> with lifetime
